summary: Comprehensive Project View feature tested successfully. All backend APIs (11/11 tests passed) and frontend UI components working correctly. Payment Schedule and Additional Costs CRUD operations verified.
seed_data_creation: Test payment stages and additional costs created during testing were cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Comprehensive Project View feature is fully functional. Backend endpoints tested: GET /projects/{id}/comprehensive, POST/PATCH/DELETE /payment-stages, POST/PATCH/DELETE /additional-costs. Frontend tabs tested: Overview, BOQ/Project Value, Payment Schedule, Additional Costs. All CRUD operations working. Summary cards update correctly based on data changes.

features_tested.comprehensive_view_page_loads: PASS - Page loads with all 4 tabs and 6 summary cards
features_tested.overview_tab: PASS - Shows Project Value Summary, Income Summary, Expense Summary, Quick Stats
features_tested.boq_tab: PASS - Displays 4 BOQ items with totals, Manage BOQ button present
features_tested.payment_schedule_add: PASS - Add Stage dialog opens, form fields work, percentage auto-calculates amount
features_tested.payment_schedule_edit: PASS - Edit button enables inline editing of amount_received
features_tested.payment_schedule_delete: PASS - Delete button removes payment stage
features_tested.additional_costs_add: PASS - Add Cost Item dialog opens, form fields work
features_tested.additional_costs_edit: PASS - Edit button enables inline editing of actual_amount and income_received
features_tested.additional_costs_delete: PASS - Delete button removes cost item
features_tested.comprehensive_view_button: PASS - Button on ProjectDetail page navigates to /projects/{id}/comprehensive
features_tested.summary_cards_update: PASS - Summary cards update correctly when data changes
